differential_diagnoses: Right atrial thrombus (secondary to pacemaker lead)
next_steps: Perform 18F-FDG PET/CT to evaluate for occult primary malignancy and assess metabolic activity of the mass.
Obtain cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (cMRI) with gadolinium enhancement for tissue characterization and to delineate infiltration depth.
Perform ultrasound-guided core biopsy or surgical biopsy of the mass to obtain histopathological diagnosis, as transvenous biopsy carries significant embolic risk.
Initiate urgent multidisciplinary consultation with cardiothoracic surgery and oncology to determine feasibility of debulking or tissue diagnosis.
Continue systemic anticoagulation for the management of pulmonary emboli while monitoring for potential tumor hemorrhage.
Discontinue empirical broad-spectrum antibiotics, given negative blood cultures and lack of clinical response.
